<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>A ton of security everywhere and especially at the front <br></li>
<li>While I was waiting outside for my friend a pizza was dropped off the pizza delivery woman went inside but was told to go to the back where shipping and receiving workers were hanging outÉ<br></li>
<li>Tue building is all glass and the workforce can work behind their desk and look outside <br></li>
<li>My friend Arka said that he doesnŐt have his own desk and if he wanted one heŐd have to work in the office 5 days a week to get a table </li>
<li>I got a card of a facilities manager <br></li>
</ul>
